name: Mulligans Indoor Golf
about: Mulligans Indoor Golf is an indoor golf simulator venue offering state-of-the-art technology for golf practice, play, and events. The facility features multiple simulator bays with data-powered capabilities, catering to a range of activities from individual practice and lessons to group events and league play. Pricing and membership options are available to accommodate both casual players and dedicated golfers seeking a convenient, modern environment to enjoy the game.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art simulators for an immersive golfing experience
Data-powered lessons to help take your golf game to the next level
Customizable event packages for parties, corporate outings, and team-building

food_and_drink.notes: Kitchen services available for events and general dining.
Full bar available, as indicated by payment methods and bar atmosphere.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify whether clubs are provided. It is recommended to bring your own equipment for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a full kitchen and bar, but does not specify if outside food and drinks are permitted.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide a specific time estimate for playing a full 18-hole round.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Mulligans Indoor Golf is kid-friendly, hosting events like birthday parties and offering a relaxed social atmosphere suitable for families.
